title: Bcl-2 and Bcl-xL: Masters of Cell Survival from Apoptosis Mechanisms to Targeted Cancer Therapy
description: A comprehensive analysis of the Bcl-2 protein family, focusing on the roles of Bcl-2 and Bcl-xL as key regulators of the intrinsic apoptosis pathway. The article explores their foundational biology, the development and application of BH3-mimetic therapeutics like venetoclax, and challenges such as treatment resistance and toxicity. It also covers novel therapeutic strategies like PROTACs and ADCs.
